input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.5.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.5.3.1
            TITLE: to drive the vehicle, each team driver must:

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5.3.1: To drive the vehicle, each team driver must:
IN.5.3.1 To drive the vehicle, each team driver must: 
a. Meet the Driver Clearance requirements  IN.5.1  
b. Successfully complete the Egress Test  IN.5.2

final_answer: To drive the vehicle, each team driver must: a. Meet the Driver Clearance requirements IN.5.1 b. Successfully complete the Egress Test IN.5.2
